schools.name: Snake
schools.blurb: Patience and venom — the bite is only the beginning. The art of 蛇噬 She Shi.

schools.name: Ox
schools.blurb: One step, one thunderclap — fights end in a single collision. The art of 牛雷 Niu Lei.

schools.name: Crane
schools.blurb: The centerline is sacred: receive, redirect, answer. The art of 鶴柔 He Rou.

schools.name: Bear
schools.blurb: Rooted stances, an iron hide — the mountain does not move. The art of 熊鐵 Xiong Tie, first of the Nine.

schools.name: Swallow
schools.blurb: Walk the circle; never be where the blade lands. The art of 燕影 Yan Ying.

schools.name: Eagle
schools.blurb: See the opening before it opens: seize, mark, finish. The art of 鷹目 Ying Mu.
